subject: Lionel Messi

pipeline.1_image_sourcing: Wikimedia Commons (CC/PD) for 2007-2026; copyrighted news-archive photo for 1996 childhood.
pipeline.2_ai_animation: Higgsfield CLI -> Kling 2.6 (kling2_6) image-to-video. Each era still animated into a 5s living clip with subtle motion. 6 clips x 5 credits = 30 credits.
pipeline.3_assembly: ffmpeg: normalize to 1080x1920/30fps, drawtext era captions, xfade dissolve transitions (morph feel), title + end cards.
pipeline.4_audio: Narration via ElevenLabs voice 'Brian' (generic, eleven_multilingual_v2) + soft synth ambient bed. NOT Messi's voice.
pipeline.note_seedance_morph: Tried seedance_2_0_mini start_image+end_image true face-aging morph -> job failed twice (not charged). Fell back to per-image Kling animation + dissolve transitions.

ai_disclosure: AI-generated/animated footage of a real person's likeness, clearly labeled as an AI age-progression edit. No lip-sync 'speaking' deepfake; narration is a generic AI narrator, not Messi's voice.
copyright_safety: 2007-2026 stages use free-licensed photos. The 1996 childhood stage derives from a COPYRIGHTED photo; publishing carries copyright + likeness risk borne by the uploader. Remove the childhood stage or license it for a fully safe publish.
known_artifacts: Childhood clip has a minor picture-in-picture zoom artifact from the i2v model; can be re-rendered.
github_size_handling: 40.46 MB < 100 MB -> committed directly. No LFS/bucket needed.
